name: AVPU Scale
description: Celeri 4-gradu conscientiae taxatio. Citius quam GCS pro initiali triage.

scoring.label: erecti
scoring.description: Patiens vigilat, sciens, et regulariter respondet

scoring.label: Vox
scoring.description: Patientes respondet solum ad excitanda verba

scoring.label: Dolor
scoring.description: Patiens tantum stimulis molestis respondet (frica sterna, cubile clavum pressum)

scoring.label: Gratus
scoring.description: Nulla responsio ad stimulos aliquos -- immediata airway interventus requiritur

interpretation.triage: Critica -- airway in periculo, GCS typice <= 8
